title: MC Relived
description: This MC Modpack (Forge 1.20.1) is a mix of realistic(ish) survival, with realistic world generation, more biomes, furniture, etc and a mix of horror thrown in.
body:
This MC Modpack (Forge 1.20.1) is a mix of realistic(ish) survival, with realistic world generation, more biomes, furniture, etc and a mix of horror thrown in. 

This can be played solo or with friends. 
So, when you're out there in the wild, be careful on who or what you run into.
Happy hunting!
